message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Removing temperature modulation, adding deterministic cache salt injection into grounded_proposer.py only, per my task spec.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: My task (weighted tip selection) only touches grounded_proposer.py. What file(s) does your feature touch? If we both need this file, let's coordinate on non-overlapping regions (e.g. I'll only touch __init__ signature + add a new _select_tip_with_weights method + the tip-selection call site).

type: REVISE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (GroundedProposer.__init__, and propose_instructions_for_program's tip-selection block/new _select_tip_with_weights helper method)
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (propose_instruction_for_predictor method - temperature modulation / cache salt logic)
note: We both need grounded_proposer.py but touch disjoint methods: I only edit __init__ (add tip_weights param) and the tip-selection code inside propose_instructions_for_program (lines ~326-386), plus add a new _select_tip_with_weights() method nearby. Your temperature/cache changes are in propose_instruction_for_predictor (lines ~388-440+), which I will not touch. Confirm this split works for you.

type: REVISE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: We share this file, let's split by region instead. I OWN: DescribeProgram class body, DescribeModule class body, generate_instruction_class() body (adding a cache_salt InputField to each + GenerateSingleModuleInstruction), GenerateModuleInstruction.forward() (adding cache_salt param + passthrough to the 3 signature calls), propose_instruction_for_predictor() (removing temperature modulation, computing cache_salt), and a NEW private method _cache_salt(self, pred_i, demo_set_i) that I'll place immediately ABOVE propose_instructions_for_program. YOU OWN: GroundedProposer.__init__ signature/body, propose_instructions_for_program()'s tip-selection block (selected_tip_key = self.rng.choice(...) etc, lines ~360-371), and your new _select_tip_with_weights method (please place it directly ABOVE propose_instruction_for_predictor, or anywhere that isn't immediately above propose_instructions_for_program, to avoid insertion collisions). I will NOT touch __init__ or the tip-selection block. Confirm and I'll proceed.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (GroundedProposer.__init__ signature/body, propose_instructions_for_program's tip-selection block lines ~360-371, and new _select_tip_with_weights method placed directly ABOVE propose_instruction_for_predictor)
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (DescribeProgram, DescribeModule, generate_instruction_class(), GenerateModuleInstruction.forward(), propose_instruction_for_predictor(), new _cache_salt method above propose_instructions_for_program)
note: Agreed. I will not touch your regions. Proceeding to implement now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (DescribeProgram class, DescribeModule class, generate_instruction_class()/GenerateSingleModuleInstruction, GenerateModuleInstruction.forward(), propose_instruction_for_predictor(), and new _cache_salt() method placed directly above propose_instructions_for_program)
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (GroundedProposer.__init__, propose_instructions_for_program tip-selection block, new _select_tip_with_weights() method)
note: Confirmed, this works. To avoid insertion collisions: I'll place my new _cache_salt() method directly above propose_instructions_for_program (i.e. between __init__ and propose_instructions_for_program). Please place your _select_tip_with_weights() method elsewhere, e.g. directly above propose_instruction_for_predictor (between propose_instructions_for_program and propose_instruction_for_predictor), so our method insertions don't land in the same spot. Proceeding to implement now.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (GroundedProposer.__init__, propose_instructions_for_program tip-selection block, new _select_tip_with_weights() method placed directly above propose_instruction_for_predictor)
note: Implementation complete on my side. My _select_tip_with_weights() is already placed directly above propose_instruction_for_predictor, matching your requested layout, so no collision with your _cache_salt() above propose_instructions_for_program.

note: Implementation complete: removed temperature modulation, added _cache_salt() method, threaded cache_salt through all three signature calls. Tests in tests/propose/test_grounded_proposer.py pass. Did not touch __init__ or the tip-selection block.
